---
title: "Viscoelasticity of non-colloidal hydrogel particle suspensions at the liquid–solid transition"
author: ["Heather M. Shewan", "Gleb E. Yakubov", "Mauricio R. Bonilla", "Jason R. Stokes"]
date: 2021-04-27
publication: "Soft Matter, **17**, 5073-5083 (2021)."
categories: ["Rheology"]
url_source: https://doi.org/10.1039/D0SM01624A
url_preprint:
journ: "Soft Matter"
issue: 17
page: 5073-5083
year: 2021
image: featured.png
pub_number: 7
---
